types.name: INT
types.description: Signed 4-byte integer. Range: -2147483648 to 2147483647.

types.name: SMALLINT
types.description: Signed 2-byte integer. Range: -32768 to 32767.

types.name: TINYINT
types.description: Unsigned 1-byte integer. Range: 0 to 255.

types.name: BIT
types.description: Integer data type 0, 1, or NULL. SQL Server optimizes storage of BIT columns.

types.name: DECIMAL
types.description: Fixed precision and scale numbers. p = total digits (1-38), s = decimal places (0-p). Default: DECIMAL(18,0).

types.name: MONEY
types.description: Monetary data. Range: -922337203685477.5808 to 922337203685477.5807. 4 decimal places.

types.name: SMALLMONEY
types.description: Monetary data. Range: -214748.3648 to 214748.3647. 4 decimal places.

types.name: FLOAT
types.description: Floating-point number. n = mantissa bits (1-53). FLOAT(1-24) = 4 bytes; FLOAT(25-53) = 8 bytes.

types.name: REAL
types.description: Equivalent to FLOAT(24). Single-precision float.

types.name: DATETIME2
types.description: Date and time with fractional seconds precision 0-7. Range: 0001-01-01 through 9999-12-31. Preferred over DATETIME.

types.name: DATETIME
types.description: Date and time. Range: 1753-01-01 through 9999-12-31. 3.33ms accuracy. Use DATETIME2 for new work.

types.name: DATE
types.description: Date only. Range: 0001-01-01 through 9999-12-31.

types.name: TIME
types.description: Time of day. Precision n = 0-7 fractional second digits. Range: 00:00:00.0000000 through 23:59:59.9999999.

types.name: DATETIMEOFFSET
types.description: Date and time with time zone awareness. Range: 0001-01-01 through 9999-12-31.

types.name: SMALLDATETIME
types.description: Date and time. Range: 1900-01-01 through 2079-06-06. Minute accuracy.

types.name: NVARCHAR
types.description: Variable-length Unicode string. n = 1-4000 chars. NVARCHAR(MAX) up to 2GB. Recommended for text data.

types.name: VARCHAR
types.description: Variable-length non-Unicode string. n = 1-8000 bytes. VARCHAR(MAX) up to 2GB.

types.name: NCHAR
types.description: Fixed-length Unicode string. n = 1-4000 characters.

types.name: CHAR
types.description: Fixed-length non-Unicode string. n = 1-8000 bytes.

types.name: VARBINARY
types.description: Variable-length binary data. n = 1-8000 bytes. VARBINARY(MAX) up to 2GB.

types.name: BINARY
types.description: Fixed-length binary data, n = 1-8000 bytes.

types.name: UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
types.description: 16-byte GUID. Use NEWID() or NEWSEQUENTIALID() as default. Commonly used as primary key.

types.name: XML
types.description: Stores XML data. Supports XQuery and xml methods (.query(), .value(), .exist(), etc.).

types.name: ROWVERSION
types.description: Auto-generated, unique binary number. Updated on every INSERT/UPDATE. Useful for optimistic concurrency.

types.name: SQL_VARIANT
types.description: Stores values of various SQL Server data types (except TEXT, NTEXT, IMAGE, ROWVERSION, SQL_VARIANT).

types.name: HIERARCHYID
types.description: Compact representation of position in a hierarchy. Used for tree-structured data.

types.name: GEOGRAPHY
types.description: Spatial data in round-earth coordinate system (lat/long). Supports spatial methods and indexes.

types.name: GEOMETRY
types.description: Spatial data in flat-earth planar coordinate system. Supports OGC standards.
